'''鈭歬-j-dh''' ('''kakajadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:coarsen|coarsen]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-j-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coarsen|coarsen]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-j-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kakajadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikajadh|thikajadh]] || [[word:jikajadh|jikajadh]] || [[word:shikajadh|shikajadh]] || [[word:kikajadh|kikajadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukajadh|thuthukajadh]] || [[word:jujukajadh|jujukajadh]] || [[word:shushukajadh|shushukajadh]] || [[word:kukukajadh|kukukajadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukajadh|thukajadh]] || [[word:jukajadh|jukajadh]] || [[word:shukajadh|shukajadh]] || [[word:kukajadh|kukajadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukajadh|thukajadh]] || [[word:jukajadh|jukajadh]] || [[word:shukajadh|shukajadh]] || [[word:kukajadh|kukajadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekajadh|thekajadh]] || [[word:jekajadh|jekajadh]] || [[word:shekajadh|shekajadh]] || [[word:kekajadh|kekajadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokajadh|thothokajadh]] || [[word:jojokajadh|jojokajadh]] || [[word:shoshokajadh|shoshokajadh]] || [[word:kokokajadh|kokokajadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokajadh|thokajadh]] || [[word:jokajadh|jokajadh]] || [[word:shokajadh|shokajadh]] || [[word:kokajadh|kokajadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokajadh|thokajadh]] || [[word:jokajadh|jokajadh]] || [[word:shokajadh|shokajadh]] || [[word:kokajadh|kokajadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kajadh|th忙kajadh]] || [[word:j忙kajadh|j忙kajadh]] || [[word:sh忙kajadh|sh忙kajadh]] || [[word:k忙kajadh|k忙kajadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakajadh|thathakajadh]] || [[word:jajakajadh|jajakajadh]] || [[word:shashakajadh|shashakajadh]] || [[word:kakakajadh|kakakajadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakajadh|thakajadh]] || [[word:jakajadh|jakajadh]] || [[word:shakajadh|shakajadh]] || [[word:kakajadh|kakajadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakajadh|thakajadh]] || [[word:jakajadh|jakajadh]] || [[word:shakajadh|shakajadh]] || [[word:kakajadh|kakajadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakajadh|shakajadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakajadh|goshakajadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakajadh|gokishakajadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakajadhn眉|shakajadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakajadhnkn眉|goshakajadhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakajadhn眉|gokishakajadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakajadhsh毛|shakajadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakajadhnksh毛|goshakajadhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakajadhsh毛|gokishakajadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakajadhro|shakajadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakajadhnkro|goshakajadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakajadhro|gokishakajadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakajadhmu|shakajadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakajadhnkmu|goshakajadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakajadhmu|gokishakajadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakajadhsher|shakajadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakajadhnksher|goshakajadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakajadhsher|gokishakajadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakajadhng|shakajadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakajadhnkng|goshakajadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakajadhng|gokishakajadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakajadhya|shakajadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakajadhnkya|goshakajadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakajadhya|gokishakajadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakajadhyam|shakajadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakajadhnkyam|goshakajadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakajadhyam|gokishakajadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakajadhn眉sh毛|shakajadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakajadhnkn眉sh毛|goshakajadhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakajadhn眉sh毛|gokishakajadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakajadhn眉ro|shakajadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakajadhnkn眉ro|goshakajadhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakajadhn眉ro|gokishakajadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakajadhn眉mu|shakajadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakajadhnkn眉mu|goshakajadhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakajadhn眉mu|gokishakajadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakajadhsh毛n眉|shakajadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakajadhnksh毛n眉|goshakajadhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakajadhsh毛n眉|gokishakajadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakajadhsh毛ro|shakajadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakajadhnksh毛ro|goshakajadhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakajadhsh毛ro|gokishakajadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakajadhsh毛mu|shakajadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakajadhnksh毛mu|goshakajadhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakajadhsh毛mu|gokishakajadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakajadhron眉|shakajadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakajadhnkron眉|goshakajadhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakajadhron眉|gokishakajadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakajadhrosh毛|shakajadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakajadhnkrosh毛|goshakajadhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakajadhrosh毛|gokishakajadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakajadhromu|shakajadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakajadhnkromu|goshakajadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakajadhromu|gokishakajadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakajadhmun眉|shakajadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakajadhnkmun眉|goshakajadhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakajadhmun眉|gokishakajadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakajadhmush毛|shakajadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakajadhnkmush毛|goshakajadhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakajadhmush毛|gokishakajadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakajadhmuro|shakajadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakajadhnkmuro|goshakajadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakajadhmuro|gokishakajadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
